target_files./c/Users/User/Desktop/이원/IBM/BOB/bob-dem: POJO model class for Pet entity based on OpenAPI spec (id, name, birthDate, type, ownerId, visits fields)
MicroProfile REST Client interface with @RegisterRestClient(configKey='petclinic') for GET /api/pets and GET /api/pets/{petId}

modernization_steps.task: Verify pom.xml already contains both quarkus-rest-client-jackson and quarkus-mcp-server-http dependencies — DO NOT modify pom.xml
Create Pet.java POJO in package org.acme with fields: Integer id, String name, String birthDate, Object type, Integer ownerId — use Jackson-compatible annotations for JSON deserialization

Create PetRestClient.java: Jakarta REST interface in package org.acme annotated with @Path("/api/pets") and @RegisterRestClient(configKey="petclinic"); define @GET List<Pet> getPets() and @GET @Path("/{petId}") Pet getPetById(@PathParam("petId") int petId)

Create PetMcpServer.java: @ApplicationScoped CDI bean in package org.acme; inject @RestClient PetRestClient; implement two @Tool-annotated methods — listPets() and getPetById(@ToolArg int petId) — both returning ToolResponse.success(new TextContent(...)) with JSON string of result; all MCP imports from io.quarkiverse.mcp.server.*

Modify petclinic-kubernetes.yaml Deployment spec: add a second container entry named petclinic-mcp using image org.acme/petclinic-mcp-bob:latest with containerPort 8888, alongside the existing petclinic container

constraints: Only implement GET (read) operations for pets — no POST, PUT, DELETE
